title: Gyrostachys lupulina

intro: Gyrostachys lupulina, also known as Spurge Laurel, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in wound healing and reducing fever.
